title: ranunculus musculus
intro: Ranunculus musculus, also known as muskrat-cress or common muskrat-cress, is a small annual plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its chemical compounds, such as alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of R. musculus include its potential to treat various conditions, such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, R. musculus is often used as a topical application or infused in teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
